item.title: Anthropic is now worth $380 billion and sharing new details about how much money it makes
item.description: The $30 billion Series G funding round, which involves Microsoft and Nvidia as backers, comes as Anthropic’s products begin to pressure legacy softwar...

item.title: Robinhood’s stock is now trading almost exactly like bitcoin — but it really shouldn’t be
item.description: Robinhood’s stock is hitting a fresh low as it follows the selloff in bitcoin, even through crypto trading is a relatively small part of its business.

item.title: More ‘see-through’ issues surface for Lululemon, and the stock is taking a hit
item.description: The athleisure company’s stock falls after more “see-through” complaints surfaced about a new leggings line.

item.title: Why Cisco’s stock is falling hard — and taking the tech sector with it
item.description: Arista’s stock is dropping ahead of earnings, after Cisco’s report sparked renewed fears about the impact of high memory prices.

item.title: ‘I feel the clock ticking’: My wife and I are in our 60s — and employ 48 people in a small town. Can we ever retire?
item.description: “We could survive financially, but my people would not.”
